nodes.label: AI as iteration tool for honing existing ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as creator of original ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use it to hone ideas I have already worked on rather than developing ideas

nodes.label: AI as research and information shortcut
nodes.grounding_span: research to short cut when I need some obscure or arcane information

nodes.label: AI as copy editor providing objective distance
nodes.grounding_span: using it as a copy editor made redrafting far faster

nodes.label: AI-generated content quality and personality
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated content feeling lifeless and generic
nodes.grounding_span: It felt a little rushed and didn't have the right personality for the genre

nodes.label: AI as tool for self-interrogation of assumptions
nodes.grounding_span: using it to interrogate my own awareness and assumptions

nodes.label: AI use in non-replacement contexts
nodes.label_negative: AI use that replaces human jobs
nodes.grounding_span: using AI when I know it is not affecting anything outside of my usage of it

nodes.label: Creative authorship and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to drive creative decisions

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: making better use of my time

nodes.label: Quality of creative output
nodes.grounding_span: the second draft can now be the quality that a third draft might have been

nodes.label: Ethical responsibility toward other creatives
nodes.grounding_span: not taking work from anyone else

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for targeted editing and research
nodes.grounding_span: I find it most rewarding using AI when I know it is not affecting anything outside of my usage of it

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI-generated content lacking personality
Concern about market flooding and devaluation of writing
Desire to maintain balanced AI use without over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to keep it much the same. A useful tool I can employ when it is needed, but not too often

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through targeted questioning
nodes.grounding_span: asking targeted questions about the reality of a situation

nodes.label: Ethical boundary-setting around AI use
nodes.grounding_span: using AI when I know it is not affecting anything outside of my usage of it
